what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset: a PNG icon named Icon_Gold_Lighting stored in the design-assets channel. It tracks the asset's identity, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, authorship, alt text, and outgoing links.

Empty alt text for an icon

References content by a blob URI

notes: A ledger stub for a gold lighting icon PNG with placeholder dimensions and no descriptive alt text.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?

purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to catalog an image asset, which it does, but the zero dimensions and empty alt text indicate the metadata is incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a versioned, addressable design-assets icon so other parts of the system can reference it by blob ID and channel path.
contribution: Provides a stable identity, channel path, and blob pointer for a gold lighting icon asset that a fused system can retain as a reference once dimensions and alt text are reconciled.
